sections.name: general_audience_abstract
sections.title: General Audience Abstract
sections.instructions: Provide a non-technical summary of the proposed research, suitable for a general audience.

sections.name: technical_abstract
sections.title: Technical Abstract
sections.instructions: Provide a concise technical summary of the proposed research, including aims, methods, and expected outcomes. (2,000 characters maximum, including spaces).

sections.name: keywords
sections.title: Keywords
sections.instructions: Provide a list of keywords that are relevant to the proposed research.

sections.name: background_and_specific_aims
sections.title: Background and Specific Aims
sections.instructions: Describe the background and significance of the proposed research, clearly stating the specific aims and objectives. Include the translational relevance of the project. Detail any knowledge gaps this research will address.

sections.name: preliminary_data
sections.title: Preliminary Data
sections.instructions: Present any preliminary data supporting the feasibility and rationale of the proposed research. Emphasize the strength of this evidence in supporting the hypothesis.

sections.name: experimental_design_and_methods
sections.title: Experimental Design and Methods
sections.instructions: Describe the experimental design and methods that will be used to accomplish the specific aims. Include sufficient detail for the evaluation of the study design and technical approaches. Mention any control groups, blinding strategies, and randomization procedures. Describe data collection methods and ensure clear alignment of these methods with the specific aims of the research.

sections.name: statistical_plan
sections.title: Statistical Plan
sections.instructions: Describe the statistical methods that will be used to analyze the data, including sample size calculations, power analysis, and the statistical tests used. Include a brief discussion of how the statistical analysis will be used to address the aims of the project.

sections.name: rationale_and_fit
sections.title: Rationale and Fit with Key Criteria
sections.instructions: Explain how the proposed research fits with key MRA criteria, including the potential for clinical impact and address how the research has the potential to produce unusually high impact and near-term advancements. Explain why the proposed research has the potential to be rapidly translated to clinical settings, and how it addresses melanoma prevention, detection, diagnosis, or treatment.

sections.name: clinical_trial_protocol
sections.title: Clinical Trial Protocol Synopsis (If Applicable)
sections.instructions: If proposing a clinical study, provide a brief protocol synopsis (5 pages max), including a timeline with milestones. Include IRB and regulatory approval, patient accrual, and timeline for completion of analyses.

sections.name: budget_justification
sections.title: Budget Justification
sections.instructions: Provide a detailed justification for all budget items. Include personnel costs, supplies, equipment, and any costs related to data sharing compliance. For Academic-Industry partnerships, include the contribution of both MRA and the industry partner.

sections.name: current_and_pending_support
sections.title: Current and Pending Support
sections.instructions: List all current and pending support for the Applicant. For Team Science applications, list support for all Key Personnel (PIs and Young Investigators). Describe and explain any overlap with the MRA proposal.

sections.name: mra_fit_statement
sections.title: MRA Portfolio Fit Statement
sections.instructions: Provide a brief statement (up to 2000 characters) of how the proposed research project fits within MRA's overall research portfolio.
